title: Savory Stir-Fried Fermented Pancakes
description: A crispy fermented pancake recipe with a silky twist, perfect for a satisfying snack. Serve as a side dish or a snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine fermented flour and salt. Gradually add water and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until the other side is golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining batter, making 4-6 pancakes.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite stir-fry ingredients.
For the silky twist, whisk the egg and add it to the batter for an extra silky texture.
